pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 19-24: mock server created on PORT=9000 listening to /patients endpoint; task.json description confirms target URL
task.json description (line 5) states 'TCP Listener on port 6661'; export_result.sh line 17 confirms test uses 'nc localhost 6661'
export_result.sh line 12 shows TEST_MRN="MRN$(date +%s)" - a dynamically generated timestamp-based value, not the static 'MRN12345' claimed in metadata
export_result.sh line 13 contains hardcoded HL7 message with 'Doe^John' (PID segment format with lastName^firstName)
export_result.sh line 13 contains hardcoded HL7 message with 'Doe^John' (PID segment format with lastName^firstName)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synchronous HL7-to-REST integration channel called MPI_Facade. The mock REST API server is created dynamically on port 9000 and accepts POST requests to the /patients endpoint. The TCP listener source is configured to listen on port 6661. The functional test in export_result.sh uses hardcoded test data with last name 'Doe' and first name 'John', but the MRN is dynamically generated using a timestamp (MRN<timestamp>) rather than the static value 'MRN12345' claimed in metadata. All data is synthetic and created within the task setup scripts.
